creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153730
svn diff for sysutils/geomgui FIXES

Attempts to reach the WWW, as well as MASTER_SITES
have failed for the past few months. As a result, I'd
like to offer to provide a reliable location for both
the WWW, and MASTER_SITES, along with all the other
ports I currently maintain.

If the current maintainer is otherwise unable to maintain
this port, I would be willing to maintain it -- just saying.

CHANGES:

Makefile - corrects (replaces) MASTER_SITES

pkg-descr - corrects (replaces) WWW, grammatical/spelling && reflow


That's it!


Please find the svn diff, attached. To accommodate this PR.

Thanks!

--Chris
